script_text: When things happen in a story, characters react.
They might feel happy, scared, angry, or proud.
How a character reacts tells us who they are.
Sam broke his favorite toy. He was heartbroken.
Heartbroken shows how deep his feeling was.
Then his friend fixed it. He was overjoyed!
Big problems show how characters handle tough moments.
Maya had a huge pile of homework. She did not give up.
She is the kind of character who stays brave!
When something happens, watch what the character does next. That is their reaction!
Now you are ready to describe how characters react!
